name: AMD
rationale: AMD is the cleanest long-only setup in the watchlist: the provided market data shows +7.74% 1W, +17.32% 1M, and +135.75% 3M momentum, with 4.79% daily volatility and only -3.96% drawdown from the high. AMD also confirmed fiscal Q2 2026 results for Aug. 4, 2026 after the close, and Reuters reported Wells Fargo raised its price target to $615 on expected EPYC server CPU upside and stronger demand/pr
